signals: NVIDIA acelera el ciclo de hardware con la arquitectura Rubin y enfoque en infraestructura soberana europea.
OpenAI fragmenta el mercado con GPT-5.4 mini, priorizando velocidad y el uso de subagentes autónomos.
Google DeepMind impulsa marcos de medicion para AGI y reconstruccion 4D para aplicaciones de robotica.
La IA generativa de mundos (Project Genie) y el TTS de baja latencia transforman la creacion de contenido interactivo.
Creciente expansion de infraestructura de IA en mercados emergentes como India para ciencia y educacion.
risks: Dependencia extrema del hardware de NVIDIA para sostener el crecimiento de la economia de inteligencia.
Falta de estandarizacion en las metricas de progreso hacia AGI frente al despliegue comercial masivo.
Complejidad en la seguridad de subagentes con capacidad de ejecucion autonoma en entornos productivos.
watch: Despliegue operativo de subagentes en la API de GPT-5.4 para tareas de codificacion y uso de computadoras.
Adopcion de la plataforma Rubin en el sector automotriz tras los anuncios del CES 2026.
Resultados del hackathon de Kaggle sobre marcos cognitivos para evaluar capacidades de razonamiento AGI.

items.title: Announcing Terafab: the next step towards becoming a galactic civilization Grok's Text to Speech API is now available in LiveKit Inference. Natural, expressi...
items.summary: Announcing Terafab: the next step towards becoming a galactic civilization Grok's Text to Speech API is now available in LiveKit Inference. Natural, expressive voices with low-latency streaming. Multilingual in 20+ languages. Telephony and production-ready out of the box. One API key. No extra setup. → [docs.livekit.io/agents/models/](https://t.co/LCX4zfQTg8) Quote xAI @xai Mar 16 Grok's Text to Speech API is now available. Start building with natural voices and expressive controls to bring your apps to life. x.ai/api/voice#text
items.why: xAI expande su ecosistema con APIs de voz multilingues enfocadas en produccion y telefonía.

items.title: Accelerating discovery in India through AI-powered science and education
items.summary: Google DeepMind brings National Partnerships for AI initiative to India, scaling AI for science and education
items.why: Google escala su presencia estrategica en India mediante alianzas nacionales para ciencia impulsada por IA.

items.title: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_...
items.summary: Watch Jensen Huang unveil the latest breakthroughs in AI and accelerated computing, and more in the [#NVIDIAGTC](https://x.com/hashtag/NVIDIAGTC?src=hashtag_click) 2026 keynote. Now live ![Image 4: ⬇️](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/2b07.svg)
items.why: NVIDIA define la hoja de ruta del hardware global para el proximo ciclo de computacion acelerada.

items.title: GPT-5.4 mini is available today in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API. Optimized for coding, computer use, multimodal understanding, and subagents. And it’s 2x fast...
items.summary: GPT-5.4 mini is available today in ChatGPT, Codex, and the API. Optimized for coding, computer use, multimodal understanding, and subagents. And it’s 2x faster than GPT-5 mini. [openai.com/index/introduc](https://t.co/DKh2cC5S3F)
items.why: Salto significativo en eficiencia y velocidad optimizado para ejecucion de subagentes y razonamiento.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.why: Propuesta de estandarizacion para medir el progreso real hacia la Inteligencia Artificial General.

items.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform, Open Models, Autonomous Driving: NVIDIA Presents Blueprint for the Future at CES
items.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the Fontainebleau Las Vegas to open CES 2026, declaring that AI is scaling into every domain and every device. “Computing has been fundamentally reshaped as a result of accelerated computing, as a result of artificial intelligence,” Huang said. “What that means is some $10 trillion […]
items.why: La plataforma Rubin marca el inicio de una nueva era de computacion de 10 billones de dolares.

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.why: Integracion profunda de Gemini en flujos de datos empresariales alcanzando rendimiento estado del arte.

items.title: Project Genie: Experimenting with infinite, interactive worlds
items.summary: Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S. can try out Project Genie, an experimental research prototype that lets you create and explore worlds.
items.why: Project Genie permite la creacion de entornos virtuales interactivos e infinitos mediante IA.

items.title: D4RT: Teaching AI to see the world in four dimensions
items.summary: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.
items.why: D4RT permite seguimiento y reconstruccion 4D masiva, clave para el futuro de la vision por computadora.

items.title: How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation
items.summary: Photos of animals being identified by the SpeciesNet AI model
items.why: Uso de modelos abiertos para la conservacion de vida silvestre mediante identificacion automatizada.

items.title: Use Canvas in AI Mode to get things done and bring your ideas to life, right in Search.
items.summary: Canvas in AI Mode is now available for everyone in the U.S. Plus, it can now help you draft documents or build interactive tools.
items.why: Google Search evoluciona de motor de busqueda a plataforma de creacion y desarrollo de herramientas.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Drops the Blueprint for Europe’s AI Boom
items.summary: At GTC Paris — held alongside VivaTech, Europe’s largest tech event — NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang delivered a clear message: Europe isn’t just adopting AI — it’s building it. “We now have a new industry, an AI industry, and it’s now part of the new infrastructure, called intelligence infrastructure, that will be used […]
items.why: NVIDIA impulsa la creacion de industrias nacionales de IA en Europa como infraestructura critica.

items.title: What does it take to build AI for scientific discovery? ![Image 10: 🧠](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9e0.svg) To celebrate 10 years of AlphaGo, and ...
items.summary: What does it take to build AI for scientific discovery? ![Image 10: 🧠](https://abs-0.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9e0.svg) To celebrate 10 years of AlphaGo, and joined on our podcast to discuss how mastering games has paved the way for it to help solve more complex problems. ↓ [00:00](https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2032147864042803617?t=0) The AlphaGo match [02:15](https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2032147864042803617?t=135)
items.why: Analisis de como el dominio de juegos complejos ha permitido avances en el descubrimiento cientifico.

items.title: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in o...
items.summary: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in one week—the largest qualitative study of its kind. Read more:
items.why: Estudio masivo sobre percepcion de riesgo y oportunidad para alinear el desarrollo de Claude.

items.title: These interviews capture texture that surveys can’t. They render in detail how people worldwide are already experiencing AI's opportunities and risks. We pla...
items.summary: These interviews capture texture that surveys can’t. They render in detail how people worldwide are already experiencing AI's opportunities and risks. We plan to use Anthropic Interviewer regularly, on different topics, to help inform how AI can be built to benefit everyone.
items.why: Implementacion de IA para escalar entrevistas cualitativas y mejorar la gobernanza de modelos.
